SPORTSBEEP ($BEEP)

Next-generation sports ecosystem on the Cardano (ADA) blockchain, integrating decentralized utility, community rewards, and high-performance sportsbooks.

Project Metadata

Website: https://sportsbeep.com

Blockchain: Cardano (ADA)

Token Ticker: $BEEP

Policy ID: a221e11c9d474ac3709911161bcfd02969d268e927089d3c55a4c3c2

Asset Fingerprint: asset1tq9v2nuxm6u7f66a0k0h8z2v7z6u9f6u9f6u9f (Verify on CardanoScan)

Total Supply: 10,000,000 (Fixed Infrastructure)

Developer: LAD MEDIA

Status: Phase 1 (Closed Beta)

Tokenomics & Distribution

The $BEEP token follows a controlled, phased distribution model to ensure ecosystem stability.

Phase

Allocation

Objective

Status

Phase 1

Beta Testers

Non-tradable off-chain testing

Active

Phase 2

Pending

Technical Guidance

Infrastructure

Architecture: Built on the eUTXO model for deterministic execution.

Standards: Cardano Native Asset (CNT). Compatible with CIP-30.

Recommended Wallets: Eternl (Power users), Lace (Official/Beginner), Nami (Lightweight).

Referral Program

Mechanism: Unique promo codes (Format: BEEP-XXXXX).

Reward: 100 $BEEP per 10 verified referrals.

Official Resources

X (Twitter): https://x.com/SportsBeep

Engineering: LAD MEDIA

Block Explorer: View on CardanoScan

Legal & Compliance

Responsible Gaming: Integrated 1-800-GAMBLER resources.

Status: Currently in Closed Beta. Digital assets are volatile.
